command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user nC6sHo9eqXDn4Lp.root --database SPWUc63a3tjYuzCxiuEomB --execute SHOW CREATE TABLE signature_requests;
messages: `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
stdout:
Table	Create Table
signature_requests	CREATE TABLE `signature_requests` (
  `id` int(11) NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `documentId` int(11) DEFAULT NULL,
  `documentType` enum('operating_agreement','board_resolution','employment_offer','contractor_agreement','nda','policy_acknowledgment','grant_application','trust_document','general') NOT NULL,
  `documentTitle` varchar(500) NOT NULL,
  `documentUrl` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `requestedBy` int(11) NOT NULL,
  `requestedByName` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `requestedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `dueDate` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `reminderSent` tinyint(1) DEFAULT '0',
  `reminderSentAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `message` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `signingOrder` enum('sequential','parallel') DEFAULT 'parallel',
  `status` enum('draft','pending','partially_signed','completed','declined','expired','cancelled') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'draft',
  `totalSigners` int(11) DEFAULT '1',
  `signedCount` int(11) DEFAULT '0',
  `completedAt` timestamp NULL DEFAULT NULL,
  `signedDocumentUrl` text DEFAULT NULL,
  `signedDocumentHash` varchar(128) DEFAULT NULL,
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`) /*T![clustered_index] CLUSTERED */
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin
